overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through stormy countryside. The character holds a torch while traversing open grasslands, an enclosed stone-walled section, and finally alongside a stream during a heavy thunderstorm.

events.description: rocky outcrops become visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path through stormy grassland while holding a lit torch

entered.detail: muddy brown trail winding through the grassland
tall green grass covering rolling hills
tall green grass covering rolling hills
dark turbulent storm clouds covering the sky with visible rain
dark tree line on the horizon
gray stone formation emerging from the grass

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide grassland path during a heavy thunderstorm. The character walks forward along a dirt trail surrounded by tall green meadows and scattered bushes. Dark storm clouds dominate the sky with rain visibly falling, while rocky outcrops appear on the left as the path progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed path with high stone embankments

events.description: path enters a narrow section flanked by high stone and earth embankments on both sides
exits the enclosed stone-walled section back into open grassland

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow passage with tall stone walls flanking both sides of the dirt path

entered.detail: tall earthen and stone wall lining the left side of the path
tall earthen and stone wall lining the right side of the path

changed.from: wide visible areas on left and right
changed.to: narrow patches visible only above the embankments

segments.scene_description: The path becomes enclosed by high stone embankments on both sides, creating a narrow corridor effect. The sky is partially visible above the walls while the character continues walking forward. The surrounding vegetation is sparse on the stone walls, and the open meadows are temporarily obscured by the embankments.

events.description: stream becomes visible on the right side of the path, gradually approaching
path curves slightly to follow the stream bank, walking parallel to the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the path as a stream gradually appears and runs parallel on the right side, continuing alongside the water

entered.detail: flowing waterway with visible current running parallel to the path
individual trees dotting the grassy landscape
tall reeds and bushes growing along the stream bank

changed.to: wide open expanse on both sides

segments.scene_description: Exiting the enclosed section, the landscape opens up to reveal a stream on the right that gradually approaches the path. The character walks alongside the flowing water for the remainder of the segment, with scattered trees appearing on the left and riverside vegetation on the right. The storm continues with heavy rain and dark clouds overhead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a storm-lashed countryside that shifts from open meadows into a narrow stone corridor before opening up along a riverside. It begins on a wide dirt trail cutting through tall green grasslands and rocky outcrops under a sky dominated by dark storm clouds and heavy rain. As the character progresses, the open landscape is suddenly replaced by high stone embankments that enclose the path into a restrictive, narrow corridor. The scene then expands once more as the character exits the stone walls, revealing a flowing stream that draws closer to the path on the right. Finally, the camera tracks alongside the water and scattered trees, maintaining the oppressive atmosphere of the ongoing thunderstorm.
